/** * Dashboard Component * Displays all medications as cards with progress bars */ import React from "react"; import MedicationCard from "./MedicationCard"; function Dashboard({ medications, loading, onDelete, onRefill }) { // Show loading skeleton while fetching data if (loading) { return (

Your Medications

{/* Loading Skeleton Cards */} {[1, 2, 3].map((i) => (
))}
); } // Show empty state if no medications if (medications.length === 0) { return (

No Medications Added

Start tracking your medications by adding your first one.

); } // Calculate summary statistics const totalMeds = medications.length; const needsRefill = medications.filter((med) => med.needsRefill).length; return (
{/* Summary Stats */}
{/* Total Medications */}

Total Medications

{totalMeds}

{/* Needs Refill */}
0 ? "border-red-200 bg-red-50" : "border-gray-100"}`} >
0 ? "bg-red-100" : "bg-green-100"}`} >

Needs Refill

0 ? "text-red-600" : "text-green-600"}`} > {needsRefill}

{/* Stock Status */}

Well Stocked

{totalMeds - needsRefill}

{/* Section Title */}

Your Medications

{needsRefill > 0 && ( ⚠️ {needsRefill} medication{needsRefill > 1 ? "s" : ""} need {needsRefill === 1 ? "s" : ""} refill )}
{/* Medication Cards Grid */}
{medications.map((medication) => ( ))}
); } export default Dashboard;
